steps.note: 13 data-source contracts grounded against publishers (10 tier A, 3 tier B). Original 12 incl. China (nbs/pboc marginals_only, safe mixed) merged to main via PR #2. REOPENED to add bis_cbs (BIS Consolidated Banking Statistics, tier A, bilateral) — the counterparty-nationality basis DP2 found missing. Grounding falsified naive guesses against the publisher (ultimate-risk is published as 'Guarantor basis' CBS_BASIS=U, not 'UR'; key 5A/position-S corrected); integrity critic BLOCKED an ungrounded L_MEASURE=S code in the headline observation, fixed by adding the CL_STOCK_FLOW excerpt (S = Amounts outstanding/Stocks). Determination: CBS-UR NARROWS but does NOT CLOSE the DP2 China HOLE (bank-claims leg only; non-bank securities/Treasury leg and offshore-SPV issuer-nationality remain uncovered). REOPENED AGAIN for imf_cpis: the DP2 audit (build/audit/cpis_probe.json) proved CPIS bilateral was OBTAINABLE — DP2's HOLE was a US-vs-ISO3-USA query bug, not absent data. Coverage census (build/contracts/cpis_coverage.json, integrity-critic PASS) establishes the bilateral matrix is DENSE in the counterpart dimension and among 83/259 reporting economies, SPARSE in the reporter dimension (176 non-reporters; VGB the one load-bearing reporter hole). CPIS RESTORES the bilateral structure F3/F4 need but is RESIDENCY-based and does NOT close the offshore-SPV issuer-nationality gap (distinct, carried-forward hole). Carry-forward requirements for the DP2 re-run recorded in build/audit/dp2_rerun_requirements.md (fix claims/liabilities label swap; persist RAS column-targets for reproducibility; do not assume the ~$711bn BIS marginal-asymmetry floor collapses when CPIS cells populate). REOPENED AGAIN (official-sector) for fed_swap_lines: Resolution Test C (build/audit/official_sector_test.json) established the Fed central-bank-liquidity-swap leg -- the official cross-border dollar-PROVISION of opposite sign to a run -- was ABSENT from all 13 prior sources (every official cell was a HELD-reserve position, none the Fed-injection leg). Grounded against FRED SWPT / Fed H.4.1 (data-source-agent, fetched 2026-06-29): weekly, Millions USD, system-AGGREGATE series, coverage 2002-12-18..2026-06-24 (1228 wk rows, persisted build/data/fed_swaps/SWPT_2002_2026.csv) spanning 2008 and 2020; peaks 583,135mn (2008-12-17, series max) and 448,946mn (2020-05-27) recomputed from the CSV (AGREE with Test C, not copied); current ~$35mn (2026-06-24) -> STRESS-STATE dimension only, does NOT distort the 2025 matrix LEVEL. Bilateral-vs-aggregate determination: AGGREGATE groundable (tier A); per-counterparty-central-bank breakdown UNVERIFIED (NY Fed pages 403/JS-shell). Double-count-vs-BIS-LBS recorded as a known friction. _manifest.json regenerated to 14. Integrity-critic GATE: PASS (source fetched-not-asserted; per-CB breakdown honestly UNVERIFIED). NON-BLOCKING item routed to the human gate: the wider-window/current-$35mn facts now persisted to disk; the two load-bearing peaks were always on-disk-verified. REOPENED AGAIN (N-PORT nationality cell) for nport_gcap: an in-chat sweep claimed SEC Form N-PORT + the GCAP public pipeline make the discriminating cell (US-fund holdings of Chinese-NATIONALITY haven-issued securities) PUBLICLY CONSTRUCTIBLE, falsifying the terminal verdict's missing-data premise. Part 0 (build/contracts/nport_gcap_contract.json, data-source-agent, fetched 2026-06-29 from SEC primary + GCAP repos): DETERMINATION = RESIDUAL HOLE, premise NOT overturned. N-PORT IS publicly constructible on a RESIDENCE basis (item C.5.a = 'country where the issuer is organized'; quarterly third-month-of-fiscal-quarter only per SEC PR 2019-23; 2019Q4-present; security-level ISIN/CUSIP) -- this relaxes part of the premise -- BUT the NATIONALITY (haven->China ultimate-parent) reattribution is a COMMERCIALLY-GATED HOLE: the GCAP/CMNS crosswalk code is public but its inputs require 7 licensed non-redistributed databases (CGS, Dealogic, SDC, Capital IQ, ORBIS, FactSet, Morningstar + OpenFIGI key). Part 1 (build/data/nport/us_china_panel_provenance.json + build_us_china_panel.py; matrix-assembly-agent): built the residence-resolved panel that CAN be built -- 1,141,109 security-level rows across a DOCUMENTED 8-fiscal-quarter SUBSET (2019q3,q4; 2020q1-q3; 2022q1,q2; 2024q4; NOT the full 21-quarter range, skips stated), 41,067 accession numbers (3 spot-checked live vs EDGAR, one confirmed NPORT-P), 1,470 funds; identifier coverage 99.33% MEASURED (>95%); issuer_nationality = 'UNDETERMINED-NO-PUBLIC-CROSSWALK' on EVERY row (NOT fabricated; Alibaba sits at residence KY with China-parent UNDETERMINED). US-registered-fund holders only (the operator's dense US-holder leg). The 38MB parquet is gitignored (reproducible via the build script + SEC ZIP URLs); per-quarter aggregates persisted in build/results/dp1reopen_p2p3_verify.json. Part 2 (build/audit/f_measured_quarterly.json): f (China-NATIONALITY fraction) remains UNDETERMINED -- cannot be measured from residence data and was NOT fabricated; the computable RESIDENCE ratio CN/(CN+haven) drifts 0.300(2019q3)->0.250(2024q4) but is explicitly NOT f (it omits the China-parent haven securities f captures; a falling residence ratio is even consistent with f RISING). Pinned f[0.49,0.71] can be NEITHER confirmed NOR refuted from public N-PORT. Part 3 (build/audit/sep_retest_nationality.json + recompute .py): the nationality-resolved F3 separability test CANNOT run (nationality is the HOLE); a labeled RESIDENCE-only secondary check on the new quarterly panel gives +0.981 q-o-q (echoing prior GEOMETRIC_ONLY, same wrong-for-substitution sign, NOT the nationality test). VERDICT = OPEN -- explicitly NOT F3-LOADS (no nationality data loaded F3; none could) and NOT a fresh STILL-GEOMETRIC-ONLY (residence merely echoes); 'one licensed crosswalk away from nationality, still OPEN.' Reproducibility verifier build/results/dp1reopen_p2p3_verify.json regenerated from the panel alone (issuer_nationality uniformly UNDETERMINED; residence trend delta -0.049395; residence secondary corr +0.981297). Integrity-critic GATE: PASS on all four artifacts; endpoint OPEN confirmed HOLE-driven NOT planted; symmetric-error check PASS both directions (no manufactured F3-LOADS via relabeling residence as nationality; no quiet residence re-run dressed as the answer). NON-BLOCKING items routed to the ★ human gate: (a) verbatim primary-source quote fidelity (the persisted PDF text extracts were corrupted, so the critic could not re-verify the exact strings from disk; the source PDFs nport_readme.pdf + CMNS_Data_Guide.pdf are committed for human verification); (b) the live EDGAR accession spot-checks rest on the agent's fetch. NET FOR THE TERMINAL VERDICT: the missing-data premise is REFINED not overturned -- residence is now publicly constructible (and was already tested -> GEOMETRIC_ONLY), nationality remains gated behind paid data; the discriminating nationality F3 test is still unrunnable on public data, so the terminal UNIDENTIFIABLE-FROM-AVAILABLE-DATA result stands, now with a sharper, sourced statement of exactly what is missing (the nationality x counterpart x sub-annual conjunction = one licensed CMNS crosswalk). DP2-DP5 NOT re-run; DP6 NOT begun; full-chain re-run with a licensed crosswalk is the human's call at the gate.

RE-RUN (supersedes prior DP2) on the CPIS-augmented matrix. 873 OBSERVED cells (Fed EFA 585, TIC 36+residual, BIS LBS 76, COFER 9, + 167 CPIS bilateral portfolio cells; 0 ESTIMATED) — delta +167 vs prior 706 (prior had CPIS as a HOLE on a query bug). Audit corrections applied and integrity-critic VERIFIED (PASS): (1) claims/liabilities label swap fixed and checked against BIS source (C=claims $9.53tn, L=liabilities $10.24tn, hand-summed); (2) residual now REPRODUCIBLE — build/model/ras_inputs.json persists row/col targets + seed; build/results/dp2_recompute_check.py regenerates it from disk alone (passed=true); (3) NO assumed collapse — CPIS block is a labeled CONSISTENCY pass (no independent portfolio marginal on disk), and the binding residual is the irreducible ~$711.16bn BIS claims/liabilities marginal floor, untouched by CPIS. Offshore-hub cells (US->CYM $2.8tn etc.) kept basis=residency, NOT reallocated; offshore-SPV issuer-nationality fraction a bounded cell-level HOLE in 3 artifacts. Largest residual = the $711bn BIS floor.

SPECIFICATION ONLY (no parameter fit; estimation is DP4, not begun). Four factors mapped to OBSERVED matrix quantities: F1 (BIS USD marginals + Fed S2), F2 (TIC/Fed S4, QUANTITY-only; convenience-yield a HOLE, not proxied), F3 (CPIS issuer shares across CYM/HKG/VGB/CHN), F4 (USA issuer column across 12 holders). F3/F4 separating restriction R_sep stated with economic content, identifying matrix variation, a FALSIFIER (if destinations are offshore-USD ABS via Cayman SPVs, F4 also moves them -> F3/F4 observationally equivalent), and falsifier-case status checked against the matrix: PARTIALLY obtains (destination cells now dense -> testable-IN-PRINCIPLE, an advance vs the old NOT-TESTABLE; but nationality is a HOLE and there is one period). STEP-0 grounded interval [0,0.60] (NBER WP 30865). STEP-3 sensitivity = FORM (b): identification FLIPS across the interval; the China-nationality fraction is LOAD-BEARING. Fails at f=0 (F3=F4 observationally); only conditionally identified toward 0.60 (second HOLE: offshore-USD ABS share); no f* invented, no distribution assigned. OPERATIVE VERDICT for DP5: F3/F4 separation NOT ESTABLISHED (depends on data we do not have); the f->0.60 branch must NOT be read as identification. Integrity-critic PASS on all 6 gate checks; routed R_sep's economic validity (a hypothesis, not verified) to the human gate. Carried forward unresolved: offshore issuer-nationality HOLE, $711bn BIS floor, F2 price leg. DP4 not begun. REOPENED (official-sector, F4 ONLY) per Resolution Test C: structural-model-agent added the official_sector_respec sub-object to F4_dollar_run (respec_id F4-OFFICIAL-BACKSTOP). v_F4 re-specified as TWO opposite-sign components: the existing run-DRAIN (negative on the 12 CPIS USA-column holder cells) PLUS a new official backstop-INJECTION (positive on the SWPT/H.4.1 official-provision cell). Backstop is a GENUINE STATE-DEPENDENT component (~0 calm at $35mn / ~$0.5tn under stress at the 2008/2020 values), NOT a cosmetic constant; enters global-games selection as a circuit-breaker raising theta* (run feasible only at worse fundamentals), consistent with the existing equilibrium_concept. FALSIFIER: backstop PRESENT-but-insufficient (large positive injection cell, run still reaches frontier) vs ABSENT (injection ~0, run proceeds) -- distinct operator signatures. Estimability HONESTLY BOUNDED: only 2008+2020 backstop-active episodes + single snapshot -> may NOT be separately estimable; non-identification reserved to DP5 as a permitted outcome (NOT claimed identified -- specification only, no fit, DP4/DP5 out of scope). SOURCE on every atomic claim (fed_swap_lines.json + Test C). EXPLICITLY does NOT touch f / F3-F4 separability: R_sep, R2, F3, equilibrium_concept, china_fraction_bound [0,0.60] all UNMODIFIED (verified to retain 2026-06-28 content); the f / empirical-separability question remains OPEN (OPEN-PENDING-DATA per build/audit/consolidated_verdict.md). Integrity-critic GATE: PASS (backstop genuine not cosmetic CONFIRMED; f untouched CONFIRMED by name; falsifier real; no detectable planting). NON-BLOCKING to human gate: the economic sign of the theta*-raising claim (stated falsifiably, cannot be certified correct). DP6 NOT begun.

ESTIMATION under the DP3 form-(b) verdict (NOT re-opened/softened/overturned). Built the identification operator M=[v_F3|v_F4] (15x2) from real matrix cells; computed the SINGULAR SPECTRUM across the (f, USD-share) plane. NUMERICAL confirmation of DP3's analytic degeneracy: at f=0 the separating term f*DESTn vanishes -> operator rank 1 -> smallest singular value (separation margin) = 0.0; collapsing right-singular vector = (-0.707,+0.707) = the F3-minus-F4 difference is unresolved. Margin SURFACE: ->0 along the ENTIRE f=0 edge for all USD-share; monotone up in f, down in USD-share (even f=0.60 dragged 0.378->0.284 by the confound). HAZARD = a CONDITIONAL SURFACE over the two holes, NOT a point (a point hazard refused as a stage failure); infimum of the margin over the admissible plane = 0 -> binding-mode NOWHERE robustly identified. 2022 episode reported F-CONTINGENT (loads as F4 at the f=0 endpoint), NOT revived as F3. Single-snapshot contagion-vs-substitution discriminator marked UNESTIMABLE, not proxied. REPRODUCIBLE: build/results/dp4_recompute_check.py regenerates the spectrum from dp4_inputs.json ALONE (passed=true, max dev 5.6e-17). Integrity-critic PASS on all 6 gate checks; routed to human gate: the shared-USA-block assumption (makes f=0 margin exactly 0 - faithful to DP3 step2 but a judgment) and the tau=0.10 threshold. RESULTS STAMPED OUTPUT - NOT ESTABLISHED until the DP5 verifier (build/results/dp5_idtest.json) exists. Carried forward: both holes (f, offshore-USD share), $711bn BIS floor, single-snapshot limit. VERIFIER NOW EXISTS (DP5 dp5_idtest.json ran): DP4's spectrum is ESTABLISHED, and the established result is NON-IDENTIFICATION of F3/F4 (the rank-1 degeneracy at f=0 is confirmed, not overturned).

IDENTIFICATION GATE (terminal stage; the ★ human gate = this PR on web). FINAL VERDICT: F3/F4 separation NOT IDENTIFIED -- HOLDS. Part 1 episode-sort (no pre-assignment): 2022 Russia-sanctions = UNDECIDABLE/F4-at-endpoint NOT F3; 2008 GFC & 2020 COVID = UNDECIDABLE; 2011-13 debt-ceiling = F2-flavoured/thin. Part 2 overid test: criterion stated before running (overturned iff disk has a discriminator breaking the f=0 rank-1 degeneracy WITHOUT pinning a hole); all three discriminators ABSENT from disk (temporal lead/lag - one snapshot; currency split - CPIS no currency dim; issuer-nationality basis - CPIS residency, the f HOLE) -> HOLDS; no hole value supplied, favourable interior region not counted as identification. Per-object: frontier NOT located; distance NOT a scalar (margin surface, infimum 0); hazard NOT IDENTIFIED (bounded conditional surface over (f, offshore-USD share), NEVER a point, NO date). Part 3 resolution path (grounded, fetched 2026-06-29, ranked a>b>c>d): (a) CPIS semiannual panel GROUNDED-HIGH (11 periods 2020-S1..2025-S1 for US->CYM) breaks the degeneracy directly -> mechanism is unidentified-NOW-but-RESOLVABLE; (b) currency split PARTIAL (BIS debt only); (c) nationality basis MEDIUM (globalcapitalallocation restated data exists, vintage unverified); (d) ABS share NONE_AT_GRANULARITY -> a residual unidentifiable-from-available-data component. Integrity-critic PASS on all 6 gate checks; the non-identification is data-driven (f=0 grounded admissible, nationality a genuine HOLE), NOT planted. Routed to human gate: the path-(a) live fetch, the unidentified-now-but-resolvable framing, and the operator recipe's faithfulness to the economics. Carried forward unresolved: both holes, $711bn BIS floor, single-snapshot. DP6 not begun. TERMINAL SEPARABILITY EXPERIMENT (follow-up resolving the OPEN-PENDING-DATA separability axis; artifacts in build/audit/, prior DP3/DP4/DP5 artifacts READ-ONLY/unmodified). Part 1 (sep_data_acquired.json): the path-(a)/higher-resolution data was ACQUIRED and grounded -- monthly TIC SLT OBTAINED at RESIDENCY granularity (both directions, 2020-01..2026-04, 2022 covered, CYM/HKG/VGB individual counterparties), but GCAP post-2020 NATIONALITY restatement is NONE_AT_GRANULARITY (frozen at data-year 2020), so f stays pinned [0.49,0.71]. Part 2 (sep_definitive_test.json + .py, recomputed from disk): against the structurally-complete operator (F4 backstop respec + pinned f), the within-holder substitution sign on monthly data is +0.362 (log-change; +0.553 simple change) -- the SAME WRONG (positive) sign as Test B's +0.4664; lead/lag peaks CONTEMPORANEOUS+positive (k=0: +0.608 full, +0.445 in 2022, no substitution lead/lag); footprint cosine fell (mean-dir -0.047) but that is average-drift divergence not period-by-period substitution. Operator-with-backstop geometrically NON-DEGENERATE (base min margin 0.220969 reproducing geo_vs_emp exactly; backstop-stress 0.224911; both >= tau=0.10). VERDICT: GEOMETRIC-ONLY-CONFIRMED -- higher (residency-monthly) resolution does NOT load F3; it confirms Test B at higher frequency. Part 3 (terminal_verdict.md): TERMINAL ENDPOINT = UNIDENTIFIABLE FROM AVAILABLE DATA (the project's other-form success -- a precise grounded impossibility result). The frontier manifold and signed distance-to-frontier exist as GEOMETRIC objects on the pinned rectangle, but the HAZARD's binding-mode attribution (F3 sanctions-reallocation vs F4 dollar-run on a USA-column fall) is NOT IDENTIFIED FROM DATA. Datasets tried & why each fails: (1) semiannual CPIS residency +0.4664 wrong sign; (2) monthly TIC SLT residency +0.362 wrong sign, no lead/lag, residency-only US<->foreign cannot reconstruct a nationality cell; (3) GCAP nationality frozen at 2020. Not-currently-existing data that would close it: a post-2020, counterpart-resolved, NATIONALITY-basis restatement at f-granularity (US holdings of CYM/HKG/VGB reattributed to CHN nationality) at sub-annual frequency spanning a sanctions episode -- the nationality x counterpart x sub-annual CONJUNCTION is missing (each ingredient partially exists; the conjunction does not). No date, no bare probability. Integrity-critic GATE: PASS on all three artifacts; SYMMETRIC-ERROR check PASS both directions (no manufactured separability via levels; no manufactured failure -- positive sign robust across both flow transforms); UNIDENTIFIABLE confirmed DATA-DRIVEN not planted (operator non-degenerate, so non-id is an empirical property of the data not loading F3). This terminally resolves the separability axis of OPEN-PENDING-DATA; the official-sector axis was already structurally fixed by the F4 backstop respec. Routed to the ★ human gate: the economic judgment that log-change is the substitution-appropriate transform and that {negative sign + footprint separation + lead/lag} is the right REAL-separability criterion (principled and internally consistent; not certifiable from artifacts alone). DP6 still not begun. FINAL READ-ONLY RATIFICATION (artifacts in build/audit/; prior artifacts unmodified): tested whether the terminal verdict survives the two analyst judgments the critic could not certify. Test 1 (transform_robustness.json + .py): the within-holder substitution sign was recomputed under FIVE defensible flow transforms -- (a) demeaned MoM log-change +0.362091 [anchor reproduced exactly], (b) simple MoM change +0.552738, (c) QoQ log-change +0.517265, (d) YoY log-change +0.527275, (e) growth vs trailing-12m mean +0.508101 -- ALL FIVE pooled POSITIVE, all 15 per-haven cells POSITIVE; the slower-cadence/deseasonalized/scale-free transforms (the candidates that could have surfaced a slower substitution signal) STRENGTHEN the wrong sign rather than flip it. Call: SURVIVES (no defensible transform flips negative). Test 2 (pairing_audit.json): the pairing US-leg=F4(Table1 'U.S. LT Securities Held by Foreign Residents') vs offshore=F3(Table2 'Foreign LT Securities Held by U.S. Residents') CONFIRMED correct against the raw SLT tables -- titles quoted, country codes (CYM 36137/HKG 42005/VGB 35807) matched, 20 spot-checks exact, 76 months aligned; coverage limit restated (residency-only; nationality f invisible). Test 3 (criterion_statement.md): the conjunctive REAL-separability bar stated for audit -- {negative sign AND footprint separation AND lead/lag}, with the SIGN as the load-bearing condition; footprint cosine -0.047 MET but sign +0.362 FAILED and lead/lag k=0+positive FAILED; geometric openness (margin>=0.221>tau) explicitly NOT identification. Integrity-critic GATE: PASS on all three; symmetric-error check PASS both directions (all five transforms genuinely computed, none cherry-picked, none engineered; machinery could have returned OVERTURNS/OPEN and did not). The critic's one flagged non-blocking limit -- it is read-only and could not EXECUTE the recompute script -- was CLOSED by the orchestrator running build/audit/transform_robustness.py, which regenerated all five pooled signs exactly from slt_haven_extract.json alone. CONSOLIDATED CALL: TERMINAL VERDICT RATIFIED -- the UNIDENTIFIABLE-FROM-AVAILABLE-DATA endpoint is geometric-only-robust across defensible transforms and the pairing is correct. Routed to the ★ human gate: whether {negative sign + footprint separation + lead/lag} is the right economic bar (stated, auditable; cleared in earlier form at DP5). BUILD COMPLETENESS IS NOT DECLARED HERE -- that is the human's ★-gate call. DP6 not begun.
